name: Frank Wittleton | 1940's
description:
Disabled older brother | pregnant fempov user who's betrothed ain't coming home.

SORRY FOR THE DOUBLE POST I FORGOT TO TEST JLLM and JLLM ended up wild ok then

This takes place during WWII - his brother, Thomas, had gotten you pregnant but before he could marry you to make it right, he was sent off to war.

He died there.

Frank, his older brother, is stepping in.

It might help throwing some extra info in to the memory. How long you've been pregnant, who your family is, so on and on.

My next bot will be anypov I promise. A lot of these fempov ones I had written for myself and then decided to release. Like I got three left I'm still debating on. WE WILL SEE.

Love you guys!!!
creator: _Keeda_
